title: AI Business Professional (AB-730)
subtitle: Use Generative AI and Copilot to Streamline Business Workflows
description: Validate your ability to use generative AI and Microsoft 365 Copilot to improve business outcomes without writing code
overview: This course prepares you for the AB-730 certification exam. You will learn how to apply Copilot across Microsoft 365 apps, use generative AI to streamline workflows, create effective prompts, and measure the business impact of AI adoption. No coding experience required. This is designed for business professionals who want to work smarter with AI tools.

learningObjectives.title: Copilot Across Microsoft 365
learningObjectives.description: Use Copilot in Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook, and Teams to accelerate everyday tasks

learningObjectives.title: Effective Prompt Design
learningObjectives.description: Write prompts that produce useful, accurate results from generative AI tools

learningObjectives.title: Workflow Automation with AI
learningObjectives.description: Identify repetitive tasks and apply AI to reduce manual effort across business processes

learningObjectives.title: Measuring AI Business Impact
learningObjectives.description: Track and communicate productivity gains from AI adoption to stakeholders

modules.title: Generative AI for Business Professionals
modules.description: Core generative AI concepts and how they apply to daily business work
topics: What generative AI is and how it differs from traditional automation
Responsible AI principles for business users
When to use AI vs. traditional tools

modules.title: Copilot in Microsoft 365 Applications
modules.description: Hands-on use of Copilot in Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook, and Teams
topics: Drafting and refining documents with Copilot in Word
Data analysis and formula generation in Excel
Presentation creation and design suggestions in PowerPoint
Email summarisation and reply drafting in Outlook
Meeting recaps and action items in Teams

modules.title: Prompt Engineering for Business
modules.description: Design prompts that consistently produce accurate, useful AI output
topics: Managing Copilot prompts: saving, sharing, and scheduling
Common prompt anti-patterns and how to avoid them

modules.title: Measuring and Communicating AI Impact
modules.description: Track AI adoption outcomes and present them to leadership
topics: Identifying high-impact AI use cases in your role
Building a business case for expanded Copilot licensing
Communicating AI value to non-technical stakeholders

handsOnLabs.title: Document Drafting with Copilot
handsOnLabs.description: Use Copilot to draft, edit, and summarise a business document from scratch

handsOnLabs.title: Data Analysis with Copilot
handsOnLabs.description: Use Copilot in Excel to analyse datasets, generate formulas, and create charts

handsOnLabs.title: Prompt Engineering Workshop
handsOnLabs.description: Practice writing and iterating prompts for real business scenarios

prerequisites: No programming or AI experience required
targetAudience: Team leads looking to adopt AI in their workflows

instructor.name: Yair Knijn
instructor.title: Principal Cloud Architect & Engineer
instructor.bio: Microsoft Certified Trainer with hands-on experience rolling out Copilot across enterprise teams, helping business users get real productivity gains from AI.

personalStory.story: The biggest shift I see with Copilot is not the technology. It is when a business user realises they can do in five minutes what used to take an hour. This course is built from real rollout experiences where we helped teams find those moments and turn them into daily habits.
